title: WizTrack UI Improvements
description:
Improve WizTrack UI with medieval/fantasy theme:
- Dark mode toggle with sun/moon icons
- Medieval menu icon
- Enhanced color palette

title: US-001: Dark Mode Toggle with Sun/Moon Icons
description:
Add a theme toggle button using sun (light) and moon (dark) icons for medieval aesthetic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add theme toggle button to MenuModal or header
- [ ] Use sun icon (☀️) for light mode, moon icon (🌙) for dark mode
- [ ] Store preference in localStorage
- [ ] Apply 'dark' class to html element
- [ ] Toggle persists across page reloads
- [ ] pnpm typecheck passes
- [ ] pnpm lint passes
- [ ] Verify in browser
close_reason: Added theme toggle with sun/moon icons, localStorage persistence, and F/OUC prevention script in layout.tsx

title: US-002: Medieval Fantasy Menu Icon
description:
Replace the burger menu icon (≡) with a medieval-themed icon.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Replace burger icon with medieval-themed icon (⚔️ or 🛡️ or 📜 or ⏳)
- [ ] Icon scales well on mobile (touch target 44px)
- [ ] Maintain same button position (top-left)
- [ ] pnpm typecheck passes
- [ ] pnpm lint passes
- [ ] Verify in browser
close_reason: Replaced burger icon with medieval crossed swords ⚔️ in MenuModal.tsx

title: US-003: Enhanced Medieval Color Palette
description:
Update the color palette to feel more fantasy/medieval while maintaining readability.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Primary: Deep purple (#4a1942) or burgundy
- [ ] Gold accents for highlights (#f4d03f)
- [ ] Dark mode: Rich dark backgrounds (#0f0f1a) with gold text
- [ ] Light mode: Parchment-like warm whites (#faf6e9)
- [ ] Maintain good contrast ratios (WCAG AA)
- [ ] pnpm typecheck passes
- [ ] pnpm lint passes
- [ ] Verify in browser
close_reason: Updated color palette with medieval theme

title: WizTrack Visualization Improvements
description:
Improve score visualization in WizTrack:
- Research better chart types for multi-player score evolution
- Implement improved visualization

title: US-001: Research and Recommend Better Visualization
description:
Analyze WizTrack's scoring data and recommend best chart type for showing multi-player score evolution over rounds.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Review current Recharts LineChart implementation in TrendsTab.tsx
- [ ] Research alternatives: stacked area, diverging bar, fan chart, heatmap, etc.
- [ ] Evaluate based on: readability, player distinction, score progression clarity
- [ ] Provide recommendation with mockup/sketch concept
- [ ] Consider edge cases: ties, negative scores, large player counts (6 players)
- [ ] Create recommendation document in tasks/viz-recommendation.md
close_reason: Created viz-recommendation.md with analysis of alternatives and recommended enhanced LineChart with jitter and area fills
